caption: A soccer training session takes place on a green grass field within a large stadium featuring rows of red and white seats. Players are dressed in blue jerseys, blue shorts, and bright green socks, while staff members wear black athletic gear. In the initial scene, players and staff are gathered near a white soccer goal, with several balls on the turf. The scene shifts to a group of players interacting and standing together on the field. Later, the action moves to a different part of the pitch where players are running in a drill, passing by staff members and bright orange cones. A large white banner on the grass displays the text "EN BREVE ÉS PRONDERÁ". Logos for "adidas" and "Emirates" are visible on the players' and staff's clothing, and a club crest is positioned in the upper right corner of the frames.
